title: tribulus zeyheri
intro: Tribulus zeyheri, also known as Devil's Claw or Wood Spider, is a perennial plant native to the subtropical regions of South Africa. The plant's roots are rich in harpagoside, a glycoside with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, which make it a valuable medicinal plant. Tribulus zeyheri is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory diseases, as well as to alleviate pain and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Tribulus zeyheri include capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
